case_title: JOHN BAPTISTA CANEPA JR. VS. HOME SERVICE CLUB OF CALIFORNIA, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2024 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-09-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOME SERVICE CLUB OF CALIFORNIA, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANEPA JR., JOHN BAPTISTA AS TO DEFENDANT HOME SERVICE CLUB OF CALIFORNIA, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF JOHN BAPTISTA CANEPA JR. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOME SERVICE CLUB OF CALIFORNIA, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANEPA JR., JOHN BAPTISTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOME SERVICE CLUB OF CALIFORNIA, INC. $4,224.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,289.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY CANEPA JR., JOHN BAPTISTA AS TO DEFENDANT HOME SERVICE CLUB OF CALIFORNIA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-29-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOHN BAPTISTA CANEPA JR. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOME SERVICE CLUB OF CALIFORNIAM, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CONTACTED THE CLERK'S OFFICE TO REQUEST A CONTINUANCE TO FILE A ZOOM REQUEST AND SUBMIT EVIDENCE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. IF NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT AT THE NEXT CALLING, THE CASE WILL PROCEED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
